columns.name: InsertId
columns.description: A unique identifier for the log entry, used to deduplicate log records.

columns.name: _IsBillable
columns.description: Specifies whether ingesting the data is billable. When _IsBillable isfalseingestion isn't billed to your Azure account

columns.name: JsonPayload
columns.description: The JSON representation of the log entry payload, often containing key audit data when not using ProtoPayload.

columns.name: Labels
columns.description: Custom key-value pairs that provide additional metadata for the log entry, such as environment or custom tags.

columns.name: logName
columns.description: The full name of the log (e.g., projects/[PROJECT_ID]/logs/cloudaudit.googleapis.com%2Factivity), showing the type and location of the log data.

columns.name: LogType
columns.description: The category or type of log, such as GKEAudit, indicating the origin of the log data.

columns.name: Operation
columns.description: Contains information about an operation associated with the log, such as operation ID and producer.

columns.name: ProtoPayload
columns.description: A structured representation of the audit log entry using the Protobuf format. Contains detailed audit event data such as method name, status, and authentication info.

columns.name: ReceiveTimestamp
columns.description: The time when the log entry was received by the logging system.

columns.name: Severity
columns.description: The severity level of the log entry (e.g., INFO, WARNING, ERROR). Indicates the importance or impact of the event.

columns.name: SourceSystem
columns.description: The type of agent the event was collected by. For example,OpsManagerfor Windows agent, either direct connect or Operations Manager,Linuxfor all Linux agents, orAzurefor Azure Diagnostics

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: The timestamp indicating when the log event was created or generated by the source system.
